analysis_maturity.note: Analysis campaign summary already performed the planned per-bottleneck and worst-case analyses; the outline maps them to paper sections.

evidence_check.note: Every quantitative claim in the paper view maps to a durable record or a worker-output artifact; unsupported claims are explicitly listed in the claim-evidence boundary.

paper_hygiene_check.note: Manuscript-facing output uses paper-native language; route-control wording and local runtime details are confined to the evidence view.

placeholder_check.note: All handoff placeholders used by the skill are listed in migrate/placeholders.md and bound in placeholder-bindings.md.

route_check.note: The next skill route is write; no missing evidence blocks drafting.

source_preservation_check.note: Source code and experiment/analysis files are referenced in the evidence view and remain at their original paths.

evaluation_coverage.note: Evaluation plan includes MAPE, max APE, 30%-error coverage, bottleneck accuracy, ablations, precision breakdown, per-bottleneck residuals, and worst-case inspection.

method_clarity.note: Method section will present algorithm quantities, baseline roofline, and each correction with equations; the pipeline figure summarizes the full predictor.

reviewer_objection_coverage.objection: Is the improvement just overfitting the calibration split?
reviewer_objection_coverage.response: Show calibration-set MAPE (4.56%) versus validation-set MAPE (4.50%) and emphasize bounded, physically interpretable factors.

reviewer_objection_coverage.objection: Does the emulator-based ground truth invalidate the result?
reviewer_objection_coverage.response: Acknowledge the emulator caveat in Limitations; frame the result as a validated recovery of known generative structure and call for silicon transfer validation.

reviewer_objection_coverage.objection: Are the corrections black-box fits dressed as white-box terms?
reviewer_objection_coverage.response: Define each factor's physical meaning and calibration bounds; show that the TMA/L2 correction alone reaches 5.76% MAPE, indicating structure rather than overfitting.

reviewer_objection_coverage.objection: Why focus on B200 rather than a more general model?
reviewer_objection_coverage.response: State the hardware scope explicitly and ground constants in B200 microbenchmarks; treat generalization as future work.

reviewer_objection_coverage.objection: Could a simpler model achieve similar accuracy?
reviewer_objection_coverage.response: Compare the TMA/L2-only model (5.76% MAPE) with the combined model (4.50% MAPE) to justify the additional occupancy and precision terms.
Describe the coverage and list omitted real-world parameters as limitations.

summary: Validation of the paper outline against claim support, falsification boundaries, method clarity, evaluation coverage, and reviewer-risk checks.
title: Academic Outline Validation Report: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor
